mentions.note: Disc drive maker, up 219% in 2025; data center demand for storage essential for AI models. Part of memory/storage complex riding secular tailwind. Watch for capacity additions.
Disk drive production supply-constrained; can't make product fast enough to meet data center demand. A horse for ages now rallied 11% on constraint signal.
Memory and storage company crushing it; making billions for shareholders on AI data center expansion.
